reach_why: Addresses broad assumptions about continual learning, memory, task identity, and hidden priors across many model settings.
novelty_why: Reframes continual learning as dependence on unlearned preconditions rather than stored examples, though akin to innate-prior debates.
falsifiable_why: Core terms are undefined and insulated from disproof by being posited as preconditions of any evidence.
explanation: Sequential learning may rely on hidden unlearned priors more than explicit memory buffers.
